## AI Video Creator v1.0.1

Patch release — workflow polish, bundled docs, and release tooling.

### What's new

- **Workflow 5 duration selector** — Quick Start Path 5 now offers **Full track (max 480s)** or **Highlight section only**, matching Path E in Analyzers and Music Video Studio
- **README PDF** — First-launch user guide cover updated to **Video Prompt Studio** (correct product copy for AI Video Creator)
- **Release notes** — v1.0.0 release documented; template added for future tags

### Auto-update

If you installed **v1.0.0**, the app checks GitHub on startup and should offer this update automatically. You can also use **Check for updates** in the header, then **Restart to install**.

### Install

Download **AI-Video-Creator-Setup-1.0.1.exe** below (new installs) or update from v1.0.0 via auto-update.
